must_detect.matched_text:
Laguna Shoreline Energy Corporation — privacy notice and retention workflow for PH operations under RA 10173 and SRC rules
We process personal information where identity is apparent or may be reasonably and directly ascertained with other data, consistent with the Data Privacy Act of 2012 and NPC guidance
Data categories include HR and payroll records, vendor onboarding files, shareholder registry extracts, and KYC artifacts for banking partners; form placeholders may show TIN 000-000-000, SSS 99-9999999, or acct no. 0000-XXXX-0000 (invalid examples)
Purposes: employment administration, tax reporting to BIR, statutory SEC/PSE disclosures, banking settlement with Tamaraw Bank, Inc. (fictional), and registrar services via Isla Verde Securities Transfer Services, Inc. (fictional)
Public-source reference: our 01 March 2025 sustainability roadmap update was posted on the PSE EDGE portal and remains available to investors (stale, public)
Data subject rights: you may request access, correction, or deletion where permitted by law; contact dataprivacy@lagunashoreline.example.ph or submit via the privacy page on our website
Retention: HR files are retained for 5 years after separation; finance ledgers for 10 years per BIR archiving guidance; capital-markets working papers for 3 years after public filing, unless litigation hold applies
Disclosures and transfers: intra-group transfers to Carabao Capital Markets Corp. (fictional) in Makati for investor-relations processing, and limited cross-border processing by Isla Verde KPO Pte. Ltd. (fictional) under data sharing agreements and standard contractual safeguards
Security: role-based access, encryption at rest, redaction of identifier fields in training sets; we avoid storing MNPI in HR or tax systems
Training note: sample “term sheet” and “deal codename” references in templates are examples only and do not describe live transactions or non-public plans
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
